subcodes.first_line: O Thou, the Succorer of the despondent, the Answerer of the distressed, the Protector of those who seek refuge, come to my aid [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مغیث الملهوفین و مجیب المضطرین و مجیر اللائذین اغثنی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for tests and difficulties, @prayer for protection, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
